title: Reward Distribution System
body:
## Description

Implement automatic reward distribution when referrals are completed. Credit bonuses to both referrer and referee upon successful verification. Integrate with existing Balance and Rewards modules.

## Requirements

- Trigger reward distribution when referee completes KYC/verification
- Configurable reward amounts (referrer: $10, referee: $5) - stored in UserBalance entity
- Integration with existing balance system (UserBalance entity with decimal precision)
- Transaction logging for audit trail (following BalanceAudit patterns)
- Handle multiple reward types (balance credits, trading fee discounts, XP/badges from Rewards module)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Rewards automatically credited upon referee verification
- [ ] Correct amounts applied to user balances (using UserBalance entity)
- [ ] Transaction records created (following BalanceAudit patterns)
- [ ] Configurable reward settings
- [ ] Error handling for failed distributions
- [ ] Integration with existing Rewards module for XP/badges

## Bounty


## Labels
- `backend`
- `rewards`
- `finance`

## Priority
High

title: Referral and Waitlist Fraud Protection Backend
body:
## Description

Implement anti-fraud measures for waitlist and referral operations to prevent bots and abuse.

## Requirements

- IP rate limit on signup and referral callbacks (use NestJS Throttler)
- CAPTCHA verification hook support
- Detect high-risk patterns (same IP, email domain dumps, too many referrals from one source)
- Mark suspicious referrals for admin review
- Flag and disable accounts detected as fraud

## Rules

- Signup from same IP > 10 within 10 mins triggers challenge
- Referrals from 1 referrer to same domain > threshold flagged
- Must preserve valid users while blocking abuse

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Rate limiting configured and enforced
- [ ] Fraud scoring function implemented
- [ ] Suspicious records in admin queue
- [ ] Manual review path created
- [ ] Security tests & false positive checks

## Bounty


## Labels
- `backend`
- `security`
- `fraud-prevention`

## Priority
High

title: Admin API for Waitlist and Referral Management
body:
## Description

Implement backend admin endpoints for monitoring and managing waitlist and referral data.

## Requirements

- Protected endpoints (admin auth)
- Endpoints:
  - `GET /admin/waitlist` (list, filters, pagination)
  - `GET /admin/referrals` (status, points, suspect)
  - `POST /admin/waitlist/{id}/invite` (manual invite)
  - `PATCH /admin/waitlist/{id}/status`
  - `POST /admin/referrals/{id}/adjust` (manual point adjust)
- Audit changes with `audit_log` table

## Rules

- Only role-admin allowed
- Operations logged for compliance
- Rate limiting on admin APIs

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Endpoints implemented and secured
- [ ] Audit logging for state changes
- [ ] Pagination for large sets
- [ ] Unit + integration tests
- [ ] Admin actions cannot crash availabilities

## Bounty


## Labels
- `backend`
- `admin`
- `security`

## Priority
Medium

title: Waitlist Email Notification Backend
body:
## Description

Implement backend email notification services for waitlist signup, referral points, and launch updates.

## Requirements

- Integrate with service provider (SendGrid/Mailgun/SMTP)
- Templates for:
  - Signup confirmation
  - Referral success + point awarded
  - Launch notification
- Queue-based sending with retry (via Bull/BullMQ)
- Track `email_status` in table

## Rules

- Only verified users get referral notifications
- Rate limit notification events per user (max 1/min)
- Retries with exponential backoff on transient failure

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Email service implemented and configured
- [ ] Template system integrated
- [ ] Event triggers for signup/referral/launch
- [ ] Retry + queue behavior verified
- [ ] Failure handling & logging

## Bounty


## Labels
- `backend`
- `notification`
- `queue`

## Priority
Medium

title: Referral Tracking Backend Logic
body:
## Description

Implement the backend logic that tracks waitlist referrals and awards referral points when referred users verify their email.

## Requirements

- Create `waitlist_referrals` table
  - id, referrer_id, referee_id, status, created_at
- Create `waitlist_referral_points` table
  - id, user_id, points, reason, created_at
- On successful referee verification:
  - link referee record to referrer
  - add 1 point to referrer
  - log referral event
- Prevent self-referral and duplicate referral attribution
- API endpoint `POST /api/waitlist/referral/callback`

## Rules

- Referral counts only after referee verifies email
- A user can be referred by exactly one referrer
- Self referral is blocked
- Each referral event is audited

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Tables and relations created
- [ ] Referral callback and processing flow implemented
- [ ] Points incremented accurately
- [ ] safeguards for double attribution and self-referral
- [ ] Unit tests for referral logic

## Bounty


## Labels
- `backend`
- `api`
- `rewards`

## Priority
High
